name: Spicy Fruit Scones
recipeInstructions:
If using self-rising flour, omit baking powder and salt.
Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Using a pastry blender, cut the margarine into the flour mixture until it resembles fine crumbs. Stir in the egg, diced fruits, and just enough half-and-half so that the dough leaves the sides of the bowl.
1. Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface.
2. Knead the dough lightly 10 times.
3. Roll or pat the dough into a rectangle about 1/2-inch thick.
4. Cut with a floured biscuit cutter, or pat the dough into a rectangle and cut into diamond shapes using a sharp knife.
5. Place the scones on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Brush the scones lightly with egg.
7. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until golden brown. Remove immediately from the cookie sheet; cool.
8. Split the scones and spread with margarine. Serve with preserves if desired.
About 15 scones; 130 calories per scone.
